summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sketchario V4 new features - 'Nuovo Post' creation and Social OAuth profiles management. Backend APIs working excellently (100% success), frontend authentication issues preventing full UI testing.

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend cannot maintain authenticated session - 401 errors on /api/auth/me after successful login
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot stay logged in, preventing access to dashboard and project features
critical_bugs.symptoms: Login form accepts credentials, backend returns 200 OK, but subsequent API calls return 401 Unauthorized

integration_issues.issue: Authentication cookies not being properly set or sent by frontend
integration_issues.technical_details: Backend sets httpOnly cookies correctly, but frontend loses authentication state

passed_tests: ✅ NEW: Social platforms endpoint - all 5 platforms configured (GET /api/social/platforms)
✅ Frontend: Login page loads correctly with proper styling
✅ Frontend: Login form accepts admin credentials
✅ All new backend endpoints for Nuovo Post and Social features working

success_percentage.backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed - all new features working)
success_percentage.frontend: 20% (login page loads, but authentication flow broken)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication cookie/session management. Backend login API works perfectly (returns 200 OK with valid tokens), but frontend cannot maintain authenticated state. Investigate AuthContext, cookie handling, and CORS configuration. All new backend features (Nuovo Post, Social profiles) are fully functional and ready for UI integration once auth is fixed.
